plugins.name: codex-plus
plugins.description: Enhanced OpenAI Codex CLI integration (multi-model, context classification)

plugins.name: media-download
plugins.description: Media download via yt-dlp with QR decode and metadata extraction

plugins.name: cdp-attach
plugins.description: Attach to running CDP instance for browser automation

plugins.name: caffeinate
plugins.description: macOS sleep prevention toggle with battery and network monitoring

plugins.name: clawd-toggle
plugins.description: Toggle clawd-on-desk (Electron desktop pet) as a tracked background process

plugins.name: safe-uninstall
plugins.description: Safely identify, investigate, and remove macOS programs with risk-assessed execution

plugins.name: graph-sketch
plugins.description: Render workflow/DAG graphs as layered ASCII box-art in the terminal

plugins.name: voice-dictation
plugins.description: Push-to-talk voice dictation daemon (whisper.cpp) transcribing speech into the active window

plugins.name: remote-tmux
plugins.description: tmux-tracked `claude remote-control` toolkit: spawn one-off sessions or keep a self-restarting --spawn-worktree pool host alive per project, reachable from the Claude app

plugins.name: excalidraw-host
plugins.description: Self-host the official open-source Excalidraw whiteboard (clone + Vite dev server, no Docker)

plugins.name: make-deck
plugins.description: Generate self-contained HTML slide decks from organized notes (progressive dimension elicitation, bundled layout-catalog skeleton, mascot decorators)

plugins.name: hourly-digest
plugins.description: Consolidated hourly Slack and Gmail digest with /loop scheduling

plugins.name: handwriting
plugins.description: Apple Notes handwriting reader — scan Apple Pencil drawings via NoteStore.sqlite and read them multimodally

plugins.name: manim
plugins.description: Render short headless Manim animations (math / parametric / 3D / equations) to browser-embeddable mp4/webm/gif with a ready-to-paste embed snippet
